entries.title: Exodus 36:14
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 8 And shave off all his hair - That the water by which he was to be washed should reach every part of his body, that he might be cleansed from whatever defilement might remain on any part of the surface of his body. The Egyptian priests shaved the whole body every third day, to prevent all manner of defilement.

entries.title: Exodus 36:19
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 14 Upon the tip of the right ear, etc. - See Clarke's note on Exo 29:20.
